summary_en:
Yasmin Romero, a resident of the Monseñor Romero Apartments and former ANC 1 Commissioner, endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes in her run for Ward 1.

As a community leader with firsthand experience working alongside residents, Yasmin understands the challenges families face around housing, safety, and access to services. Her endorsement reflects the trust of those who live and work in the community in Jackie’s hands-on, results-driven leadership.
summary: Neighbors across Ward 1 are coming together behind Jackie’s vision.
summary_es:
Yasmin Romero, residente de los apartamentos Monseñor Romero y excomisionada de ANC 1, respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes en su candidatura al Concejo por el Ward 1.

Como líder comunitaria con experiencia directa trabajando junto a los residentes, Yasmin entiende de primera mano los desafíos que enfrentan las familias en vivienda, seguridad y acceso a servicios. Su respaldo refleja la confianza de quienes viven y trabajan en la comunidad en el liderazgo cercano, comprometido y orientado a resultados de Jackie.
title_en: Yasmin Romero, Community Leader and Former ANC Commissioner, Endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes
title_es: Yasmin Romero, líder comunitaria y excomisionada de ANC, respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes
title: Neighborhood Support for Jackie
source: Yasmin Romero - Tenant Monseñor Romero Apartments and Former ANC1
